title: Chart Evidence Canvas
chartSubtitle: Use a chart, table, image, screenshot, map, or timeline as the page anchor

insights.label: Main claim
insights.text: Summarize the grounded takeaway supported by the visual anchor.

insights.label: Evidence note
insights.text: Identify source coverage, method limits, or confidence level.

insights.label: Implication
insights.text: Connect the evidence to the audience decision or next action.
